chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1322 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 6091/2020 2. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shehzad, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Abdullah, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that this matter is squarely covered by a Division Bench of this court dated 15.03.2021 passed in CP D 655 of 2020, therefore, this petition may also be disposed of in the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
